name: Ai On Ai Degradation Controls
description: Propose a governance rule set for ai on ai degradation controls.
related_rules: AI-generated reflections or rule proposals may never directly modify production rules.
Prompt sensitivity and cross-run stability MUST be measured explicitly for all judge and scoring subsystems.
Reflexion-style self-reflection may run only in sandboxed improvement loops, never as a live production writer or updater.
related_validators: Configure evaluators (LLM-judges, discriminators, metrics) to run with greedy decoding and fixed seeds to ensure deterministic behavior.
Use rule-based checks in production runtime; confine LLM-as-judge and Reflexion-style loops to sandbox analysis unless explicitly frozen and approved.
related_failure_modes: AI-on-AI degradation where evaluator or reflection bias shapes production rules indirectly.
LLM-as-judge exhibits prompt sensitivity, self-preference, and rubric drift, masking true quality.
Reflection-style tone contamination where sandbox reflections bias prose toward explanatory blandness.
